_comment: Voltage code translations for hydraulic valve cross-referencing. Maps manufacturer-specific voltage codes to normalized form and Danfoss DG4V equivalents. Add entries when a new manufacturer format is encountered.

notes.danfoss_dgv_codes: DG4V-3 voltage suffix codes: G7=12VDC, H7=24VDC, J7=48VDC, A7=110VAC 50Hz, B7=115VAC 60Hz, D7=220VAC 50Hz, E7=230VAC 50/60Hz, F7=240VAC 50Hz
notes.fallback: If a competitor voltage code is not in by_manufacturer, try parsing it as a bare number (e.g. '24' -> 24VDC) or common suffix (e.g. '24VDC' already normalized)
